{{CargoRelic
|name=Master Chef Caldron
|class_id=20290
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Master Chef was extremely picky about ingredients. He made a bronze caldron specifically to season all ingredients into his favorite flavors. However, after he disappeared, the pot also lost its magical abilities.
|fame=17
|art=12
|fth=32
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail RUSH +20<br>Unicorn Express Supply Order Reset SPD +1
|ss2=Snail RUSH +40<br>Unicorn Express Supply Order Reset SPD +1
|ss3=Snail RUSH +60<br>Unicorn Express Supply Order Reset SPD +1
|ss4=Snail RUSH +60<br>Unicorn Express Supply Order Reset SPD +1
|ss7=Snail RUSH +60<br>Unicorn Express Supply Order Reset SPD +1<br> (Awakened)
}}
